name: Hellscape
short_description: Hellscape is a "Based-Text" Adventure game. Similar to Text-Based games from the 80's, with a lighthearted twist, and way more balls jokes than ever necessary.
detailed_description:
What is Hellscape?

Hellscape is a text-based adventure game, full of puzzles, a little bit of combat, and a lot of terrible jokes. You play Hellscape using only a keyboard, by typing the actions you want to perform.

What Awaits Me in Hell?

  • Puzzles, some designed by Satan himself
  • A bunch of monsters. Demons, Skeletons, Goblins and more.
  • Literally not one real graphic
  • A terrible narrator
  • Diet Paint?
  • An endless stairway (Or is it?)
  • A sick pair of shades that you can't see through...
  • You can kiss the rat
  • Other cool... stuff...
  • Actually I think kissing the rat is the only good feature in the game
